basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) Recruitment 2026 for post of Research Associate. Candidates with M.Sc Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 05-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIM Kozhikode official website iimk.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation in Mathematics from a leading National Institute with experience in networks, graph theory, and/or random matrix theory.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: IIM Kozhikode Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
